title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SOME- Where in Tokyo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IN SEARCH OF A PLACE TO HAVE FUN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SEVEN UNIQUE INDI- VIDUALS HAVE GATHERED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're the YouTube group known as Fischer's!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Manga

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you guys recognize this place!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't tell me we're in...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This group has somehow... entered the one piece universe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the captain of the Fischer's pirate crew, silk road!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A lot happened and they ended up forming a pirate crew!! Now, they're heading out to sea for an adventure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I tried walking on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Super Long Stilts

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WOO HOO! I was able to get on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're amazing, silk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: These Stilts are No joke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But how do I get off of these?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Some- one help!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're gonna go ahead and leave, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If we ever see each other again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you still consider me to be your friend!!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Help me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We tried to fish..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I caught a big one!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NNGAGA GAGA!! HIC- DO YOU GUYS HAVE ANY BOOZE?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We fished up Granny Kokoro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's acting like he didn't catch her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The power to change the future...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is equal in each and every one of us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...I'm sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My pants ate your ice cream.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take this and buy your- self 5 scoops.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you run into that guy while carrying an ice cream, he'll buy you a bigger one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: oh dear...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
